mission.title: keda: Prometheus scaler - add option to consider null values as errors
mission.description: Prometheus scaler - add option to consider null values as errors. Requested by 12+ users.

steps.title: Check current keda deployment
steps.description:
Verify your keda version and configuration:
```bash
kubectl get pods -n keda -l app.kubernetes.io/name=keda
helm list -n keda 2>/dev/null || echo "Not installed via Helm"
```
This feature requires a working keda installation.

steps.title: Review keda configuration
steps.description:
Inspect the relevant keda configuration:
```bash
kubectl get all -n keda -l app.kubernetes.io/name=keda
kubectl get configmap -n keda -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=keda
```
### Proposal

Add option to consider null values as errors

### Use-Case

We heavily rely on KEDA on our prod, had an incident and I’m looking for ways to circumvent such cases in the future.

steps.title: Apply the fix for Prometheus scaler - add option to consider null values as…
steps.description:
_Provide a description of what has been changed_
- [N/A] A PR is opened to update our Helm chart ([repo](https://github.com/kedacore/charts)) *(if applicable, ie. when deployment manifests are modified)*
Relates to https://github.com/kedacore/keda/issues/3064
Relates to https://github.com/kedacore/keda-docs/pull/769 (docs)

See the source issue for community-verified solutions.

steps.title: Verify the feature works
steps.description:
Test that the new capability is working as expected:
```bash
kubectl get pods -n keda -l app.kubernetes.io/name=keda
kubectl get events -n keda --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10
```
Confirm the feature described in "Prometheus scaler - add option to consider null values as…" is functioning correctly.
